iran_nuke.notes: Day 17 01:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IDF claims 80% of Iran's air defense destroyed — this could paradoxically push Iran toward nuclear hedging if regime survival feels threatened, but no enrichment escalation yet. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). NEW: Drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai International Airport — fire ongoing, no injuries (Guardian/Sky). IDF claims 80% of Iran's air defense destroyed, 70% of ballistic missile launchers 'out of operational use' (Sky/IDF). Trump demands 'about 7' countries join Hormuz policing coalition (AP). Trump again criticizes UK for not joining strikes. IDF says it will keep fighting 'until threats removed.' Tehran strikes continue overnight. Macron demands Pezeshkian 'immediately put an end' to Gulf attacks. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). IDF says it will continue fighting Iran AND Hezbollah 'until threats removed' (Sky). No ceasefire signals. Ground ops continue. 100 (capped, stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Trump NATO Hormuz threat + UK criticism could further strain NATO cohesion. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. US-China trade talks in Paris continue. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China's Hormuz inaction. China faces pressure to join Hormuz coalition (90% of its oil transits Hormuz). 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week). No new provocations in last 8h. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). Russia fired 68 missiles + 430 drones + 1,530 KABs in past week. 6 killed Saturday in Kyiv region strikes. Zaporizhzhia residential hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion. Ukraine deep strikes on Iskander in Crimea continue. UK considering interceptor drones to ME, diverting from Ukraine aid. 88 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 17 01:00 — IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE). 75+ civilians killed by Pakistani airstrikes, 115,000 displaced (NYT). No ceasefire. Fighting shows no letup (Guardian/AP). Taliban retaliates in Kandahar + Helmand. Qatar-brokered Oct ceasefire fully collapsed. 99 (capped, stable).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
HARDENING (Day 17 01:00):
- NO DE-ESCALATION SIGNALS: Zero softening across all trackers. No ceasefire proposals, no diplomatic breakthroughs.
- IDF STRATEGIC SHIFT: IDF now openly projecting 3+ more weeks minimum of operations. Claims to have degraded 80% of Iran's air defense — meaning they intend to maintain air superiority for sustained campaign, not a quick strike.
- TRUMP COALITION BUILDING: Expanding pressure from bilateral to multilateral — demanding 'about 7' countries join Hormuz policing. Threatening NATO's future. This is escalation, not diplomacy.
- DUBAI CIVILIAN INFRASTRUCTURE: Drone hits fuel tank at Dubai airport. Civilian aviation infrastructure now in the crosshairs. Raises stakes for international community.
- NET: All trajectories remain hostile. No diplomatic off-ramp visible. Day 17 of sustained multi-front warfare with no end-state articulated beyond 'weaken Iran severely.'
changed_signals.synagogue_note: US domestic: Michigan synagogue attack suspect's brother confirmed by IDF as Hezbollah commander killed in Israeli strike. IDF claims operational link. Domestic blowback from ME conflict intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Drone strikes fuel tank near Dubai International Airport — fire ongoing
latest_news.source: The Guardian / Sky News / Dubai Media Office
latest_news.text: Dubai civil defence fighting fire at fuel tank near DXB caused by 'drone-related incident.' No injuries reported. Dubai media office says fire from drone incident 'in the vicinity' of airport. Multiple drone hits on Dubai in recent weeks denting safe-haven image.

latest_news.headline: IDF claims 80% of Iran's air defense destroyed, 70% of ballistic missile launchers disabled
latest_news.text: IDF military briefing: struck 80% of Iran's defensive systems, removed 70% of ballistic missile launchers from 'operational use.' Progressing to targeting military industries and 'entire production chain.' Weapons 'found in Lebanon, Gaza and Syria.' Calls it 'prolonged but necessary.'

latest_news.headline: Trump demands 'about 7' countries join coalition to police Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Trump demands approximately 7 countries join US-led coalition to reopen and police Strait of Hormuz. Expands pressure beyond NATO to regional states. Most specific coalition demand yet.

latest_news.headline: IDF says it will keep fighting Iran and Hezbollah 'until threats removed'
latest_news.text: IDF states it is 'prepared and determined to complete the mission and remove the threats against the State of Israel.' No withdrawal timeline. 'Prolonged but necessary' operation. Applies to both Iran and Hezbollah fronts.

latest_news.headline: Macron tells Iranian president to 'immediately put an end' to Gulf attacks
latest_news.text: Macron spoke with Pezeshkian, demanding Iran 'immediately put an end to the unacceptable attacks.' France says it intervenes in 'strictly defensive framework.' Macron says 'uncontrolled escalation' plunging region into chaos. Calls for new political/security framework in Tehran.

latest_news.headline: Pakistani airstrikes kill 75+ civilians in Afghanistan, 115,000 displaced
latest_news.text: Pakistani airstrikes have killed at least 75 civilians and displaced 115,000 in Afghanistan. Both sides vowing escalation. No ceasefire in sight. Sharpest single escalation yet in the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Trump again criticizes UK: 'when I asked for them to come, they didn't want to come'
latest_news.text: Trump tells FT UK 'might be considered' closest ally 'but when I asked for them to come, they didn't want to come.' Accused Britain of trying to join wars 'after we've already won.' Previously criticized Starmer for not allowing US to use UK bases for initial Iran strikes.

latest_news.headline: Baghdad Airport struck by rockets — 5 injured
latest_news.text: Several rockets hit Baghdad Airport and surrounding areas. 5 injured including 4 airport security personnel and an engineer. Former US base adjacent to airport targeted with drones and rockets. Iran-backed militias continue attacks on US facilities in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine in single day
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 68 missiles and about 430 drones Saturday. 6 killed in Kyiv region. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion. Massive aerial bombardment continues.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 17 01:00). DAY 17 CONTINUES: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): Dubai airport fuel tank hit by drone. IDF claims 80% air defense destroyed, 70% launchers disabled — but Iran still launching salvos. Trump demands 7-country Hormuz coalition. FM still rejects dialogue. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): IDF says 'keep fighting until threats removed' — no withdrawal. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 93 (RISING): 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE): 75+ civilians killed, 115K displaced. (5) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55. (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: IDF's 80%/70% air defense claim is double-edged — while it degrades Iran's retaliatory capacity, the regime may feel existentially threatened, increasing nuclear hedging risk. No diplomatic off-ramp visible. Trump expanding coalition pressure but no country has formally committed to Hormuz policing. Dubai civilian infrastructure targeting escalating.
